headline: Exit Interview: Marriott CFO Leeny Oberg reflects on decades-long career
summary: In a one-on-one interview, Oberg shares lessons learned, the impacts of technology on travel and Marriott’s growth prospects as she passes the baton.

raw.headline: Exit Interview: Marriott CFO Leeny Oberg reflects on decades-long career
raw.summary: In a one-on-one interview, Oberg shares lessons learned, the impacts of technology on travel and Marriott’s growth prospects as she passes the baton.

headline: Iran war threatens $11.7 trillion global travel industry as passengers get caught in crossfire
summary: Travelers who are far from falling missiles, drone attacks and other geopolitical flashpoints aren't immune to ripple effects.

raw.headline: Iran war threatens $11.7 trillion global travel industry as passengers get caught in crossfire
raw.summary: Travelers who are far from falling missiles, drone attacks and other geopolitical flashpoints aren't immune to ripple effects.

headline: Nokomis Capital Initiates Stake in Apple Hospitality REIT as Marriott and Hilton Hotels Drive Steady Demand
summary: Nokomis Capital initiated a new position in Apple Hospitality REIT, a hotel owner focused on upscale properties branded under Marriott and Hilton. As the lodging sector moves beyond its post-pandemic rebound, investors are watching whether room rates and occupancy can remain stable across a more normalized travel cycle.
